Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Pierce Enterprises To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Lewis Wisecarver, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS LEWIS WISECARVER, VICKI NUNEZ, ET AL.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT PIERCE ENTERPRISES TO PRODUCE CUSTODIAN(S) OF RECORDS AND PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to compel defendant Pierce Enterprises to produce custodian(s) of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents and request for sanctions of $1081 is granted. No opposition filed. The deposition shall take place by February 28, 2013. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Vicki Nunes As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Briana E. McCarthy of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Lewis Wisecarver

RULING:
PLAINTIFF LEWIS WISECARVER'S MOTION TO APPOINT VICKI NUNES AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO LEWIS WISECARVER, AND SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR LEWIS WISECARVER, DECEASED PLAINTIFF AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to appoint Vicki Nunes as successor-in-interest to Lewis Wisecarver, and substitute successor-in-interest for Lewis Wisecarver, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
